data.body: S5 OPERATOR PROVISIONING done: (1) terraform apply (targeted) created SSM /rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token + CloudWatch alarm rebar-autolander-errors (instance user_data drift deferred). (2) put-parameter real RebarBotNava token (v2). (3) Gerrit ACL cutover: rebase right live on refs/heads/* (refs/meta/config 2415e53->2bae47b->9c3a32c). NOTE: rebaseOnBehalfOfUploader is NOT a recognized per-ref permission on 3.14.1 (absent from /access) — the  right authorizes on-behalf; removed the inert lines + amended #593. S5 code #592 + config #593 pushed. Next: land full stack, deploy container (autodeploy/compose-up), live E2E, close all.
